summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Each job-listed PR was classified independently per the shard instruction; already-closed PRs are kept closed, the security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling, and the remaining open PRs are retained for normal maintainer/review flow rather than closure or merge.
